channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Request for public tree pruning on Burnt Ash Lane shopping parade, 5th May
item.description:
I have received complaints that the public street trees on Burnt Ash Lane shopping parade need pruning as some may be touching buildings. Could I please receive an email telling me if this is possible and when was the last date the trees were maintained within the tree strategy schedule. My email: alisa.igoe@bromley.gov.uk Many thanks. Cllr Alisa Igoe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Burnt Ash Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal overflowing bin, 5th May
item.description:
The squatters at Argos are filling a bin they do not own with rubbish (included laughing gas canisters from their party ) It is overflowing and they have left it on the street right outside my house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 5th May
item.description:
There is broken glass in the cycle path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battersea Park Road, Clapham Junction, Greater London

item.title: Broken glass, 5th May
item.description:
There is broken glass all over the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 178-180, Thessaly Road, Clapham Junction, Greater London

item.title: Tyre left on flower bed, 5th May
item.description:
Partially concealed by vegetation - previously reported

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet Roll Tube Flytipped (Approx. 4m Long), 5th May
item.description:
The owner of this van, reg. No. EX10 XSD, supposedly a carpet fitter, completed a job today and then flytipped the carpet roll tube on the road. It is approx. 4m long and quite heavy. Please remove. If he does this at every job he completes, it can cause an issue. Also his MOT ran out on 15 Oct 2025.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Wadhurst Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag with metal box inside, 5th May
item.description:
As per image

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags left in corner, 5th May
item.description:
As per image - there’s generally always fly tipping left in this area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 5th May
item.description:
A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found by Hackney Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Frames left on Glendale Road, 5th May
item.description:
Extension of littering on the road and entrance to franks park on path. Frames on pavement and bin bags in park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glendale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: Builders fly tipping been there for five days, 5th May
item.description:
It’s growing by the day. One builder left some stuff there and then another. Blocking pathway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Springdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering along Holmdale Terrace (Hackney end), 5th May
item.description:
There is lots of litter and waste built up along pavement and gully behind Stamford Hill station. Please can there be a streetclean.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tripping on pavement, 5th May
item.description:
People keep tripping outside number 17 as the other driveway dropped curb hasn’t been replaced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees seriously overhanging pavement, 5th May
item.description:
Over the years these trees and hedges have grown slowly until they seriously block the pavement blocking the way for wheelchairs and disabled pedestrians

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravens Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 Ospringe Road, 5th May
item.description:
I am writing to request that you arrange for three trees in our communal garden at 20 Ospringe Road, NW5 2JE, to be pollarded. The trees have grown significantly and are now blocking a substantial amount of sunlight from reaching the garden. This lack of light is preventing other plants and flowers from growing properly, which is affecting the overall condition and usability of the space for residents. In addition, one of the three trees located on the boundary edge adjacent to the public pavement is causing damage to our boundary wall. This is becoming a growing concern in terms of both safety and property maintenance. I would also like to highlight that this issue has been reported multiple times previously by myself and other residents, but unfortunately no action has yet been taken. We would greatly appreciate it if this matter could be reviewed and addressed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Ospringe Road, Kentish Town, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Marshgate path - Rubbish fly tipped, 5th May
item.description:
Fly tipped rubbish on “Marshgate path”

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Duke Of Wellington Avenue, Woolwich

item.title: Outside 57 Iverson road, 5th May
item.description:
The tree is enormous and hasn’t been pruned in years. It is now touching our property and shedding into our gutters.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47-71, Iverson Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car been dumped here for weeks, 5th May
item.description:
This car has just been dumped on the pavement. It it in terrible condition, looks awful and is blocking the forecourt of the pharmacy meaning people park illegally elsewhere on the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet
